notes: Two fixes. (1) TTS now always speaks with US English pronunciation: u.lang is forced to 'en-US' on every utterance regardless of the underlying voice's reported lang, and the auto-picked voice strictly prefers en-US (with rank-quality sort within US voices). (2) Audio stall fix: moved navigator.mediaSession.setPositionState out of the per-timeupdate hot path (called ~4×/sec, which makes Chrome on Android mark audio as stalled and pause it). Now called only on discrete state changes — play, pause, seek, ratechange, loadedmetadata. Service worker cache bumped to v4 to flush stale caches from earlier versions.
